name: Turkey Spaghetti Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, sauté the onion and garlic in olive oil until lightly browned.
2. Add the chopped tomatoes, tomato paste, dried basil, and dried thyme to the pan.
3. Stir in the chopped cooked turkey and cook for 20 to 25 minutes while cooking the noodles or macaroni.
1/6 recipe not including noodles - 215 calories, 3 lean meat, 2 vegetable exchanges, 9 grams carbohydrate, 22 grams protein, 10 grams fat, 190 mg sodium, 627 mg potassium, 54 mg cholesterol.
